data.title: Despite Geopolitical Fears, Crypto Market Shows Signs of Maturity and Growth, According to Research
data.description:
TL;DR The crypto market rose 2. 62% in June, but Bitcoin dropped over 11% and fell below $100,000 due to geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Stablecoin supply surpassed $250 billion, driven by the GENIUS Act in the U. S. and an on-chain transaction volume $7. 5 trillion higher year-over-year. PancakeSwap jumped from a 16% to a 42%. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/despite-geopolitical-fears-crypto-market-shows-signs-of-maturity-and-growth-according-to-research/

data.title: Bessant: Trump will decide whether to extend trade talks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said Trump will decide whether to extend negotiations with trading partners beyond the July 9 deadline. "We will do what the president wants, and it will be up to him to decide whether they are negotiating in good faith," Bessant said Thursday on CNBC when asked about the possibility of an extension of the deadline. Bessant said he met with EU trade representatives Thursday morning and said U.S. Trade Representative Greer would "work hard over the weekend" with European officials. When asked about the negotiations with Japan, Bessant said there was still no agreement with Japan, probably because domestic politics in Japan complicated the negotiations. Regarding Vietnam, Bessant said his understanding was that the agreement "had been reached in principle" and that the 20% tariff announced by Trump was the core of the agreement, which would not be superimposed on the 10% general tariff. (Jinshi)

data.title: Central Bank of Bahrain issues stablecoin regulations
data.description:
The Central Bank of Bahrain (CBB), having issued a consultation paper on stablecoins back in October 2024, has now issued the full stablecoin regulation on July 2nd, 2025. The CBB is offering licenses to stablecoin issuers and custodians for fiat-backed stablecoins that could be either in Bahraini Dinar or United States Dollars or any other […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bahrain-issues-stablecoin-regulations/

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary: The selection of a new Federal Reserve Chairman will begin in the fall
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said there are many excellent candidates for the Fed chairman, and he will start working on this in the fall. Earlier, according to the Wall Street Journal on June 25, U.S. President Trump is considering nominating the next Fed chairman in advance to weaken the influence of the current chairman Powell, who currently has 11 months left in his term as Fed chairman. People familiar with the matter revealed that Trump is considering selecting and announcing Powell's successor by September or October, "and Trump's anger at Powell may cause him to announce his successor earlier sometime this summer." Trump considers former Fed governor Kevin Warsh and White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett. In addition, people familiar with the matter revealed that someone recommended Treasury Secretary Bessant as a potential candidate; other competitors include former World Bank President Malpass and Fed Governor Christopher Waller. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Comments on Interest Rates and Potential Fed Actions
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent has stated that the country is currently experiencing very high real interest rates. If the Federal Reserve does not lower rates in the upcoming meeting, there might be a larger rate cut in September.

data.title: ZKasino rug pull suspect arrested in United Arab Emirates
data.description:
Police arrested 21-year-old Ildar Ilham over the $30M rug pull orchestrated by crypto betting platform ZKasino.
source: https://protos.com/zkasino-rug-pull-suspect-arrested-in-united-arab-emirates/

data.title: Distinct Possibility Studios Completes $30.5 Million Funding, Led by Bitkraft Ventures and Brevan Howard Digital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 game platform Distinct Possibility Studios has completed a $30.5 million financing, led by Bitkraft Ventures and Brevan Howard Digital, with participation from the Tezos Foundation, Hashed, Delphi Ventures, Shima Capital, North Island Ventures and Decasonic. The game studio was founded by John Smedley, co-founder of EverQuest, and the funds will be used to support the development and launch of its AAA shooting game Reaper Actual, which is expected to be available on Steam and Epic Games Store. (The Block)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson: If the Fed does not cut interest rates at this meeting, the rate cut in September may be even larger
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson said that we are currently at a very high level of real interest rates. If the Fed does not cut interest rates at this meeting, perhaps the rate cut in September will be even greater. (Jinshi)

data.title: BNB price outlook as Nano Labs scoops $50m BNB tokens
data.description:

source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bnb-price-outlook-as-nano-labs-scoops-50m-bnb-tokens/

data.title: Tether signs MoU with Adecoagro to develop a Bitcoin mining project in Brazil
data.description:
Tether Holdings Ltd. , the issuer of the USDT stablecoin, has signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) with South American agribusiness firm Adecoagro S. A. The agreement was disclosed in a press release on Tether’s website on Thursday. The two companies plan to collaborate on a Bitcoin mining pilot project in Brazil, merging renewable energy capabilities with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-signs-mou-with-adecoagro-btc-mining/
